text:
There was once a small town named Quiet Hollow. People loved talking there because nobody bothered them. But there was an owl girl named Olive.

Olive loved owls. She'd watch nightly from her attic bedroom window. One gray Saturday morning, she saw something extraordinary.

A bird fluttered down. It was unlike anything she'd Ever seen. Bright orange and feisty.

Olive chased.

It flew o'clock.

She found him high up owling.

So bold!

She chased till her legs fell asleep.

But he flew away.

She liked owl feathers.

Later, she clipped one.

Her bedroom smelled fancy.

She never owl.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
